feature_tested: Department-Specific Analytics (Spa, Engineering, Purchasing) & Integration Stubs (Toast, QuickBooks, SendGrid, Resend)
summary: Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). All department analytics APIs working correctly. Integration status endpoint returns 4 providers. Calendar events API returns April 2026 events. Frontend: Spa Analytics tab works perfectly with all KPIs, treatment mix, therapist utilization, categories, and peak hours. Engineering Ops module fails to load (dynamic import error). Global Calendar not accessible due to sidebar navigation issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Failed to fetch dynamically imported module: EngWorkTickets/index.tsx

integration_issues.issue: Module fails to load with dynamic import error

endpoints: Spa analytics has kpis (total_revenue, total_appointments, avg_ticket, retention_rate, etc.)
Engineering analytics has kpis (total_tickets, open_tickets, resolution_rate, etc.)
Purchasing analytics has kpis with COGS (food_cogs, bev_cogs, total_cogs, cogs_pct)
All integrations are not_configured by default
Calendar events have April 2026 dates (15 events in April)
Calendar events can be filtered by date range
Calendar outlets has data array with outlets

verified_elements: Spa Wellness panel loads with data-testid='spa-wellness-panel'
Spa Analytics shows Total Revenue KPI ($860)
Spa Analytics shows Avg Ticket KPI ($172)
Spa Analytics shows Revenue by Treatment section
Spa Analytics shows Therapist Utilization section with 6 therapists
Spa Analytics shows Revenue by Category (Massage 84.9%, Facial 15.1%)
Spa Analytics shows Peak Booking Hours section
failed_elements: Engineering Ops module fails to load (dynamic import error)
Global Calendar navigation blocked by sidebar overlay issues

action_items: FIX: Engineering Ops module dynamic import error - EngWorkTickets/index.tsx fails to load
INVESTIGATE: Sidebar navigation issues blocking Global Calendar access
VERIFY: Dashboard error with 'Retry' button appearing intermittently
critical_code_review_comments: Backend dept_analytics.py correctly implements Spa, Engineering, and Purchasing analytics with proper KPIs
Backend pos_gl_oauth.py correctly implements Toast, QuickBooks, SendGrid, Resend stubs with status endpoint
Frontend SpaWellness/index.tsx correctly implements Analytics tab with all required sections
Frontend EngWorkTickets/index.tsx exists but fails to load dynamically - may be a build/bundling issue
Calendar API returns April 2026 events correctly (15 events found)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working (100%). Spa Analytics tab fully functional. Engineering Ops module has dynamic import error preventing loading. Global Calendar API works but frontend navigation has issues. Integration stubs (Toast, QuickBooks, SendGrid, Resend) are MOCKED - return stub responses.
